  "findings": [
    "Severe electrical arcing and sputtering sound detected inside the panel",
    "High risk of thermal runaway, localized fire, or catastrophic equipment failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately isolate and de-energize the electrical panel following proper LOTO procedures",
    "Inspect all terminations and splices for loose connections, oxidation, or thermal damage",
    "Re-terminate or replace damaged conductors and torque to manufacturer specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a distinct, irregular sputtering and crackling sound superimposed on the 60Hz hum, which is characteristic of active electrical arcing rather than normal electromagnetic hum. This indicates a loose termination or failing splice that poses an immediate fire and safety hazard.",

    "NEC 110.14 (Electrical Connections)",
    "NFPA 70E (Standard for Electrical Safety in the Workplace)"
  ]
}
